title: श्री साई अष्टकम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री साई अष्टकम् ॥

शिर्डीशं सच्चिदानन्दं सद्गुरुं प्रणमाम्यहम्।
श्रद्धासबूरिदातारं साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ १॥

द्वारकामाईवासिनं धूनीज्वालासमन्वितम्।
उदीप्रसाददातारं साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ २॥

भक्तवत्सलमीशानं सर्वधर्मसमन्वयम्।
दीनदयालुदेवेशं साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ ३॥

अभयं वरदं शान्तं करुणापूर्णविग्रहम्।
सर्वरोगहरं देवं साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ ४॥

सत्यव्रतधरं शुद्धं सर्वभूतहिते रतम्।
निस्संगं निर्विकल्पं च साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ ५॥

दरिद्रदुःखहन्तारं भक्तसंकटनाशनम्।
आनन्ददायकं नित्यं साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ ६॥

योगिराजं परं ब्रह्म अवधूतं दिगम्बरम्।
विश्वव्यापिनमव्यक्तं साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ ७॥

सर्वमंगलरूपं त्वां सर्वसिद्धिप्रदायकम्।
शरणागतदीनार्तं साईनाथं नमाम्यहम्॥ ८॥

॥ फलश्रुतिः ॥

साईनाथाष्टकं पुण्यं यः पठेद्भक्तिसंयुतः।
सर्वपापविनिर्मुक्तः साईसायुज्यमाप्नुयात्॥

॥ इति श्री साई अष्टकम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Sai Ashtakam ||

Shirdisham sachchidanandam sadgurum pranamaamyaham |
Shraddha-saburi-dataram Sainatham namamyaham || 1 ||

Dwarakamai-vasinam dhuni-jwala-samanvitam |
Udi-prasada-dataram Sainatham namamyaham || 2 ||

Bhaktavatsalam ishanam sarva-dharma-samanvayam |
Dina-dayalu-devesham Sainatham namamyaham || 3 ||

Abhayam varadam shantam karuna-purna-vigraham |
Sarva-roga-haram devam Sainatham namamyaham || 4 ||

Satya-vrata-dharam shuddham sarva-bhuta-hite ratam |
Nissangam nirvikalpam cha Sainatham namamyaham || 5 ||

Daridra-duhkha-hantaram bhakta-sankata-nashanam |
Ananda-dayakam nityam Sainatham namamyaham || 6 ||

Yogirajam param Brahma avadhutam digambaram |
Vishva-vyapinam avyaktam Sainatham namamyaham || 7 ||

Sarva-mangala-rupam tvam sarva-siddhi-pradayakam |
Sharanagata-dinartam Sainatham namamyaham || 8 ||

|| Phalashrutih ||

Sainathaashtakam punyam yah pathed-bhakti-samyutah |
Sarva-papa-vinirmuktah Sai-sayujyam apnuyat ||

|| Iti Shri Sai Ashtakam Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: शिर्डी साईं बाबा की स्तुति में रचित इस अष्टकम् में उनके दिव्य गुणों का वर्णन है। साईं नाथ सच्चिदानन्द स्वरूप, श्रद्धा और सबूरी के दाता, द्वारकामाई में निवास करने वाले, धूनी की ज्वाला से भक्तों को उदी प्रसाद देने वाले हैं। वे सभी धर्मों का समन्वय करने वाले, दीनदयालु, सर्वरोगहर, सत्यव्रती, दरिद्रदुःखहर्ता, योगिराज, परब्रह्म स्वरूप और सर्वमंगलदायक हैं। इस अष्टकम् के भक्तिपूर्ण पाठ से सर्वपापनाश और साईं सायुज्य प्राप्ति होती है।
benefits: Invokes the blessing of the grace and blessings of shirdi sai baba
Traditionally recited for removal of all sins and purifies the devotee
Traditionally recited for removal of poverty, suffering and obstacles
Invokes healing from physical and mental ailments
Leads to spiritual union (sayujya) with Sai
description: Sai Ashtakam — श्री साई अष्टकम् — is an eight-verse devotional hymn offered to Shree Sai Baba of Shirdi. Attributed to Sai Bhakti Literature, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Devotees recite this prayer to destroy all sins and purify the devotee and cultivate faith (shraddha) and patience (saburi). It is also said to lead to spiritual union (sayujya) with Sai. It is especially recommended on Thursday (Guruvar) and during Guru Purnima for maximum spiritual benefit. With 8 verses and a reading time of about 5 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Sai Ashtakam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Sai Ashtakam in Sanskrit with English transliteration and Hindi meaning. Eight-verse hymn to Shirdi Sai Baba for blessings, healing and peace.
